text:
Created attachment 160299
Patch to update p5-AnyEvent-HTTP to 2.22

Update AnyEvent::HTTP perl module to version 2.22.
Also set NO_ARCH while here.

Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/AnyEvent-HTTP

Poudriere build log: http://poudriere.vovkasm.org/data/10-1-amd64-devel/2015-08-24_11h49m58s/logs/p5-AnyEvent-HTTP-2.22,2.log

Thanks Anton Yuzhaninov for remind me.
